title: hemizonia increscens
intro: Hemizonia increscens, also known as the largeflower hemizonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hemizonia increscens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, and can be applied topically to affected areas to reap its medicinal benefits.
